title: TYL&TYS 5 Bunches Autumn Artificial Eucalyptus Stems, Autumn Leaves Decorations, Orange Long Stem Faux Eucalyptus Leaves for Home, Fall Decorations & Wedding Centerpieces, Halloween Thanksgiving Decor
features: 【Fall Artificial Eucalyptus Material】The artificial eucalyptus stems are crafted from premium silk fabric and plastic. The eucalyptus stems have sturdy metal wire stems can be easily bent or trimmed to suit your decorative needs

【Realistic Eucalyptus Stems】The branches of artificial plants featuring the latest gradient dyeing technology, these autumn eucalyptus leaves boast a rich, natural color. The silk craftsmanship replicates the appearance, shape, and even the texture of real eucalyptus leaves—turning them into a stunning accent for any decor

【Autumn Eucalyptus Leaves Decor】Perfect for autumn decorations, these autumn faux eucalyptus leaves can be elegantly displayed in vases, creating vibrant and romantic floral arrangements ideal for Thanksgiving tables or seasonal gatherings

【Easy to Maintain Faux Fall Stems】 Faux silk eucalyptus branch let you place them directly wherever you like—no pruning, no watering, and no other tedious upkeep required. These realistic autumn faux eucalyptus stems bring life to any ordinary space; ideal for sprucing up your living room, dining table, kitchen, hallway, or garden, they also work beautifully for crafting DIY bouquets. Wherever you put them, they add a fresh touch of nature that elevates the space effortlessly

【Artificial Eucalyptus Stems Size】Each package includes 5 bundles of autumn fake eucalyptus leaves, each standing at 61cm(23.6 inch) tall, ensuring you have beautiful decor for your fall decorations at home or special events. Enjoy the beauty of autumn with our eucalyptus plant collection
description: Product Description TYL&TYS offers year-round botanical solutions, from lifelike artificial plants to seasonal natural specimens. Discover our collections: handcrafted floral arrangements and Artificial plants for every British season. Product Specification Brighten your Home with Lifelike Artificial Eucalyptus Stems Branches Materials: Silk, Plastic Size: 34" / 60cm (total length) Colour: red-orange autumn eucalyptus Package Included:5×Artificial Eucalyptus Stems Application: Vase arrangements, Wedding centrepieces, Indoor botanical deco Perfect for adding a touch of autumnal charm throughout your home and garden, these eucalyptus stems enhance spaces like your dining table, living room, bedroom, study, front door, patio, or garden. These fall artificial eucalyptus stems with orange-red leaves and brown branches, they look full and vibrant. Lifelike Texture Crafted from silk, the autumn eucalyptus stems feature red-orange hues. Designed for multi-season reuse, they complement harvest centrepieces or standalone displays with seasonal authenticity. Adjustable Branches Stems with iron-wire cores and taupe paper wrapping, Gently reshape to achieve fuller arrangements for autumn displays. Bendable Stems The fake fall stems can be twisted into any shape and trimmed to any size that you want, to meet your DIY projects or personalized decor. These autumn faux eucalyptus leaves are widely used and suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Adjusting Your Eucalyptus Stems Leaves！ Simply trim or bend the stems to your desired height to create stunning seasonal arrangements. They're also ideal for your DIY craft projects, or any other indoor and outdoor embellishment. Each stem contains an inner wire core for easy shaping. Please note: Some leaves may detach during shipping as the flowers come pre-assembled in the box. Simply reattach any loose flowers – it takes just a second. Feel free to reshape as needed.
